manifest.title: SPX GTH 结构为什么总觉得缺一层
manifest.description: 2026-07-22 GTH 三小时实时数据、故障日志与当前结构算法的证据化诊断。

query.sql: SELECT 181 AS total_frames, 130 AS ready_frames, 7 AS degraded_frames, 44 AS unavailable_frames, 350 AS es_session_samples, 22 AS raw_structure_changes, 129 AS comparable_structure_transitions
query.description: Bounded 181-frame GTH option-history window plus the latest ES market frame and provider-failover state.
metric_definitions: Availability rate is frames satisfying the component-specific non-null and quality predicate divided by 181 retained frames.
Live structure requires quality=ready and structure.frozen is not true.
Fresh L1 requires contract_count>0 and fresh_candidate_count>0.
Raw structure change rate is consecutive ready, non-frozen frames whose (put wall, flip zone, call wall) signature changed, divided by 129 comparable transitions.
Risk-neutral density is available only when density.quality=ok.

sources.label: IBKR stream and Schwab GTH chain journal

query.description: Read-only inspection of the two material GTH option-data outages and the current Schwab fallback freshness.
filters: IBKR error 10197 and competing-session policy events

sources.label: Current GTH feature and decision implementation

query.description: Read-only review of option exposure conventions, GTH quality bypass, stability, session features and additive regime scoring on master commit 1b50fae6.
filters: no product-code changes in this diagnostic

query.sql: SELECT 0 AS contract_consistent_sessions, 0 AS gth_exact_entries, 20 AS review_target
query.description: Frozen forward-only readiness gate for exact GTH two-leg evidence.

query.sql: SELECT * FROM root_causes ORDER BY rank
query.description: Prioritized synthesis of live-frame quality, feed failures, state-machine behavior and current feature coverage.

sources.label: GTH strike coverage and 15-minute report audit

query.engine: DuckDB as-of reconstruction + JSON report audit + repository contract inspection
query.sql: SELECT 18 AS delivered_reports, 18 AS scheduled_reports, 18.0/18.0 AS delivery_rate, 758.0/(14.0*61.0) AS raw_30_strike_coverage, 0.0/18.0 AS full_ladder_render_rate
query.description: Separates the 81-strike rotating collection universe, fresh as-of quote coverage, the 64-contract L1 feature cap and what the 15-minute report actually renders.
filters: stable healthy comparison excludes 08:15 warm-up and the 10:00 outage
full C/P pair requires both call and put with two-sided quotes
metric_definitions: +/-30 strike levels means 30 five-point strikes below ATM, ATM, and 30 above: 61 C/P pairs or 122 option contracts.
+/-30 points means ATM-30 through ATM+30 at five-point spacing: 13 C/P pairs or 26 option contracts.
L1 feature coverage reproduces the implementation sort by distance to underlier followed by the 64-contract truncation.
A report has a full strike-price ladder only if it renders the complete target grid rather than OI counts or top-four walls.

cards.description: Frames with a ready option structure in the retained three-hour GTH window.
Frames whose option-implied density passed the strict quality gate.
The current exposure model explicitly does not infer participant or dealer inventory sign.
Signature changes across 129 consecutive comparable ready-frame transitions.
Longest consecutive unavailable run in the retained GTH window.
Still-open unavailable run at the 12:33 CST cutoff.
The ES market frame remained ready while the option frame was unavailable.
All scheduled reports from 08:15 through 12:30 CST were durably delivered.
Average fresh full C/P coverage of the 61-level ATM +/-30-strike target across 14 stable healthy report snapshots.
No delivered report rendered a complete strike-price ladder; reports show compressed structure instead.

charts.title: GTH structural component availability
charts.subtitle: 181 one-minute frames, 09:33–12:33 CST; rate is valid frames / 181
charts.question: Which GTH structural layers were actually populated in the latest three-hour window?
charts.rationale: Horizontal bars expose the split between continuous ES context, intermittent option analytics and the permanently unknown dealer sign.

tables.title: Material GTH option-frame runs
tables.subtitle: Runs with at least three consecutive frames; timestamps are UTC and CST.

tables.title: Why the GTH structure feels incomplete
tables.subtitle: Ordered by causal impact on the current report, not by implementation effort.

tables.title: What +/-30 means at each layer
tables.subtitle: The collection universe, fresh cache, L1 feature and report are intentionally different widths.

tables.title: 15-minute report contract audit
tables.subtitle: Cadence and fail-closed behavior pass; strike disclosure and LLM semantic fidelity do not.

blocks.body:
# SPX GTH 结构为什么总觉得缺一层

**结论：当前产物更准确地说是“ES 路径 + 间歇性 SPXW 代理结构”，还不是完整的 GTH 市场结构。**

## Technical Summary

截至 2026-07-22 12:33 CST，ES 分钟帧仍为 ready，累计 350 个 session 样本；同一时刻 SPXW 期权帧为 unavailable，L1 合约数为 0，墙位来自 frozen_last_usable_option_frame。最近 181 个一分钟期权帧里只有 130 个 ready（71.8%），风险中性密度只有 119 个 quality=ok（65.7%），dealer position sign 则是 0/181。

因此缺失感不是行情刷新频率低，而是刷新最频繁的是 ES 价格路径；用于解释 dealer/vol/skew/liquidity 的 SPXW 数据是一整组同时掉线的依赖。结构一掉线，系统仍能发 GTH heartbeat，但只能把 ES 映射到冻结墙位，信息量看起来很多，新增信息却很少。

新增的 strike 审计进一步表明：健康时底层并不算稀疏。14 个稳定健康的 15 分钟截面里，ATM +/-30 点始终有 13/13 个完整 C/P 对；若“+/-30 strikes”指上下各 30 档，则底层平均有 54.1/61 对（88.8%），但 L1 特征被截成最多 64 个合约，也就是 32 个 C/P strike 对，报告又继续压缩为 OI 摘要、最多 8 个 key strikes 或每侧 top-4 墙位。因此“没有最终 +/-30 档价格”主要是 feature/report contract 的截断，不是原始采集完全没有。

15 分钟 cadence 也不是问题：08:15–12:30 CST 共 18/18 份送达，相邻间隔 894–908 秒。但内容校验存在真实缺口：09:15 的 LLM 改写把模板中的 Call Wall 7550 写成 7500，并把数值 ES/L1 行改成定性描述；这些数字都曾出现在模板别处，所以当前只检查“有没有新数字”的 validator 没有识别字段错配。
价格锚 181/181 都存在，但 chain-implied SPX 锚只有 127/181；L1、实时结构、exposure 和 ATM IV 都只有 130/181。它们几乎同步缺失，说明不是四个独立算法同时坏掉，而是上游 SPXW 链一断，整个结构栈一起退化。dealer sign 0/181 是另一类问题：这是模型能力未声明，不是临时故障。

### 1. GTH 的单点不在 ES，而在 SPXW 实时链

今天 09:50–10:09 CST 的 20 分钟缺口和 12:16 CST 之后的持续缺口都出现 IBKR 10197：competing live session owns shared market data。Schwab 的 ES 锚仍新鲜，但 GTH SPXW 返回的是上一交易时段的 stale chain，所以 fallback 不能重建实时 IV、skew、density 或 NBBO。

### 2. 当前 GEX 是结构代理，不是 dealer 仓位

公式固定为 call positive、put negative，再乘 OI（盘中版本可加 volume）和 BS gamma；代码明确写着 dealer_position_sign=unknown。OI 主要是上一结算时点存量，volume 也没有 open/close 与买卖方向。因此墙位可以做定位，但不能回答“隔夜是谁在加仓、dealer 是否真的短 gamma、哪一侧正在被迫对冲”。

### 3. 原始结构会跳，稳定层又容易被数据缺口卡住

130 个可比较的 ready 帧产生 129 次相邻转换，其中墙/Flip 签名变化 22 次（17.1%）。稳定结构要求跨桶两次确认；当前候选停在 1/2，而旧结构事件已 invalidated。于是报告连续重复“结构切换中”，既不敢采用新墙，也不能从旧墙生成新判断。

### 4. ES 帧有路径，但还没有完整的 auction/flow 结构

现有 ES 帧包含 1/5/15/60/180m 回报、session high/low、Asia/Europe 范围、VWAP、swing 与总成交量增量。它没有按价成交分布 POC/VAH/VAL、主动买卖 CVD、订单簿失衡、吸收/扫单、Asia/Europe open anchored VWAP。当前 price_volume_alignment 只是价格方向与累计总 volume 增量的规则，不是 aggressor flow。

### 5. 最终 regime 是规则分数，不是经 GTH 样本校准的概率

趋势/回归层按固定 +25/+20/+15/+10 权重累加，再与阈值比较；输出的 80/30 是 rule score，不是 80%/30%。截至 2026-07-18，forward-v3 contract-consistent session 与 exact GTH two-leg entry 都是 0/20，尚没有足够的同口径证据去校准 Asia、Europe、US premarket 各时段的命中率与置信区间。

## Strike Coverage Audit

**“+/-30”必须先说单位。** 当前五点一档：`+/-30 points` 只有 13 个 strike 对；`+/-30 strike levels` 则是 61 个 strike 对、122 条期权线。前者今天健康截面全部覆盖，后者的底层新鲜缓存大多覆盖 53–56/61 对，却无法穿过 64-contract L1 cap，更不会在压缩后的 15 分钟文本里逐档出现。

## 15-Minute Report Audit

定时器、投递和 outage 时的 fail-closed 表达都工作正常；不能说整份报告“没有问题”。`81档/77档正常` 说的是结构/OI universe，不代表 81 档都有当前可执行价格。报告没有披露新鲜 C/P 对数量、连续半径、最远 strike 与价格 age，又由 LLM 在安全模板上二次改写；当前 validator 只禁止新造数字，不能保证数字仍绑定原字段。

## Scope, Data and Metric Definitions

诊断窗口是 2026-07-22 09:33–12:33 CST 的 181 个 GTH 一分钟 option frames，并对照 12:33 CST 的 minute_market_frame、option_structure_frame、provider_failover_state 与 live surface snapshot。ready 只表示该帧通过当前质量规则；它不等于 dealer sign、official SPX OHLC 或完整 GTH chain 可用。availability 不插值，也不把冻结结构计为实时结构。

## Methodology

1. 复现同一时刻 ES 与 SPXW 两条数据链的质量状态。
2. 在保留窗口内按明确 predicate 统计各结构层可用率，并识别连续 outage runs。
3. 对 ready、non-frozen 帧计算 put wall / flip / call wall 相邻签名变化。
4. 对照 IBKR 与 Schwab journal 确认共同上游故障。
5. 审阅 exposure 公式、GTH thin-payload 规则、稳定确认和 regime scoring，区分数据缺失、模型能力缺失与表达层压缩。
6. 在每个 scheduled report 的 snapshot_as_of 上重建每个 IBKR 合约的最后状态，只接受 live、mid 非空、source age<=90 秒的 SPXW 20260722 报价，并分别统计 +/-30 points 与 +/-30 strike levels 的完整 C/P 对。
7. 复现 64-contract L1 distance sort，并逐份比较 delivered_text、template、writer 与 delivered_ok。

## Limitations and Uncertainty

这是单个 GTH session 的三小时运行快照，足以定位当前缺口，但不足以评价策略收益。IBKR 10197 能证明共享行情被其他 live session 占用，不能仅凭服务端日志识别具体客户端。dealer 仓位、open/close 与 aggressor side 本来就不在现有数据契约中，因此不能从 OI/volume 反推。Schwab GTH stale chain 被正确 fail closed；报告中“不可执行”是安全行为，不应通过放宽 freshness 消除。

Strike as-of 审计使用已压实的 quote lake 重建最近合约状态，与生产 LatestState 的语义一致，但不是交易所原生逐包回放；08:15 是新到期日 warm-up，10:00 是已确认 outage，因此稳定健康均值只使用其余 14 个截面。覆盖率证明数据存在，不等于每档都适合成交。

## Recommended Next Steps

1. P0：把 IBKR GTH market-data ownership 做成硬运行前提；竞争 session 出现时立即显示“谁占用/何时恢复”，并停止反复重连风暴。若账户规则允许，交易终端与采集使用独立行情 entitlement。
2. P0：报告显式拆成 `ES path ready`、`SPXW structure ready`、`execution ready` 三层；冻结墙只显示 last-known age，不再与实时判断混排。
3. P1：补 auction layer：Asia/Europe open、anchored VWAP、POC/VAH/VAL、initial balance、overnight inventory。
4. P1：数据许可时补 flow layer：aggressor delta/CVD、book imbalance、absorption/sweep；否则明确标为 unavailable，不能用总 volume delta 代替。
5. P1：墙位稳定从“值相等两次”升级为 rank persistence + exposure magnitude + uncertainty band；数据 gap 暂停确认时钟，不反复制造 1/2 候选。
6. P1：按 Asia/Europe/US premarket 分层保存 regime score 与 outcome，输出经验命中率、样本量和置信区间；分数继续 shadow，直到 forward exact cohort 达标。
7. P0：15 分钟报告固定输出三种 coverage：`structure strikes`、`fresh C/P pairs`、`priced radius`，并明确单位是 points 还是 strike levels；不要再用“77档正常”替代价格覆盖。
8. P0：GTH 数字字段直接使用 deterministic template；若保留 LLM，只允许改写解释段，并把结构化字段逐字段回验。Call Wall、Flip、ES horizons、L1 count/score 缺失或错位时必须回退模板。
9. P1：如果产品目标确实是上下各 30 档实时价格，将 L1 数据模型从 64 contracts 提升为至少 122 contracts，或把 full ladder 作为独立表格/网页视图，不挤进 15 分钟摘要。

## Further Questions

- IBKR 共享行情占用能否从客户端/会话元数据定位并在网页直接提示？
- 当前 64-line hot lane 是否足以同时覆盖 ATM、25d call/put、关键墙与 exact spread 双腿？
- 产品要的“+/-30”是 +/-30 points，还是 ATM 上下各 30 个 strike levels？
- 完整价格梯应放在网页可滚动表格，还是只在报告附件提供快照？
- 墙位 rank persistence 的最佳半衰期应按 Asia、Europe、US premarket 分开吗？
- 在没有 aggressor-side ES 数据时，是否接受仅用 auction profile，还是采购可验证的 tick/depth 源？

outage_runs.interpretation: Final usable chain; last usable frame 12:11
Chain collapses to zero fresh L1
Open outage at cutoff; frozen structure

root_causes.cause: GTH SPXW live-chain ownership is fragile
root_causes.evidence: IBKR 10197 during both material gaps; current coverage 0/20 contracts and 0/10 pairs; Schwab chain timestamp is prior session
root_causes.effect: IV, skew, density, L1 and live walls disappear together
root_causes.fix_direction: Make market-data ownership a first-class health contract and remove the shared-session single point

root_causes.cause: GEX sign is a house proxy, not participant inventory
root_causes.evidence: Calls positive, puts negative; dealer_position_sign=unknown in 181/181 frames
root_causes.effect: Walls locate concentration but cannot describe actual dealer hedging pressure
root_causes.fix_direction: Keep proxy label; add open/close and signed-flow evidence only from a defensible source

root_causes.cause: Raw walls mutate faster than the confirmation clock
root_causes.evidence: 22 signature changes across 129 comparable transitions; stable layer requires two buckets
root_causes.fix_direction: Use rank persistence, magnitude bands and gap-aware confirmation

root_causes.evidence: ES path is continuous; SPX strikes use chain-implied or ES+basis; GTH opens at 20:15 ET while Globex context begins earlier
root_causes.effect: Location can drift even when the economic structure did not
root_causes.fix_direction: Carry coordinate, basis age and session anchor on every structural level

root_causes.cause: Auction and signed-flow layers are incomplete
root_causes.evidence: Returns, ranges and VWAP exist; no POC/VAH/VAL, CVD, absorption or ES depth in the decision frame
root_causes.effect: The report sees direction but not acceptance, inventory or liquidity behavior
root_causes.fix_direction: Add auction profile first; add signed flow only with auditable tick/depth data

root_causes.cause: Regime scores are deterministic heuristics without GTH calibration
root_causes.evidence: Fixed additive point weights; forward exact GTH cohort remains 0/20
root_causes.effect: 80/30 looks precise but is not a probability or confidence estimate
root_causes.fix_direction: Calibrate by session phase and report n, hit rate and uncertainty

strike_layers.observed_coverage: 81 strikes / 162 C+P contracts across roughly ATM +/-200 points
strike_layers.contract: Wide strikes are rotated; they are not all guaranteed concurrent
strike_layers.consequence: The lake can be dense even when a single feature frame is narrower

strike_layers.observed_coverage: Stable healthy snapshots averaged 54.1/61 full pairs inside +/-30 strike levels; range 53-56/61
strike_layers.contract: quality=live, source age<=90s, call+put both two-sided
strike_layers.consequence: Raw data was mostly present; it was not a complete 61-pair grid

strike_layers.observed_coverage: 64 contracts = 32 complete near-ATM C/P strike pairs in every stable healthy snapshot
strike_layers.contract: Sorted nearest ATM and truncated at hot_option_limit=64
strike_layers.consequence: Cannot represent ATM plus 30 strikes on both sides, which needs 122 contracts

strike_layers.observed_coverage: 0/18 reports rendered a full price grid
strike_layers.contract: Compact prompt limits key_strikes to 8 and prohibits full Greeks/wall ladders; walls are top-4 per side
strike_layers.consequence: OI count can say 76-81 strikes normal while per-strike prices remain invisible

strike_layers.observed_coverage: 13/13 full C/P pairs in all 14 stable healthy snapshots
strike_layers.contract: ATM-30 through ATM+30 at five-point increments
strike_layers.consequence: If the intended width was points rather than strike levels, collection was sufficient

report_contract.evidence: 10:00, 12:15 and 12:30 reported L1 unavailable and blocked executable pricing
Reports show 76-81 OI strikes but do not show fresh pair count, priced radius, extrema or quote age
09:15 template Call Wall 7550 became 7500; numeric ES 60m/VWAP and L1 73.6 (IBKR 64) were omitted
Only 2/8 DeepSeek outputs were byte-identical to the deterministic template; validator checks number membership, not field binding
Report contract intentionally compresses to summaries and top walls
report_contract.assessment: FAIL for the requested product behavior
